ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Aug-05-2024 Continued To Sep-09-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Administrator Poco Young and the Attorney Nicole Kelly to appear on September 9, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear and why a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status of administration has not been filed.

An order to show cause re sanctions is also being issued for the same date for Attorney Nicole Kelly to appear and show cause as to why sanctions in the amount of $250.00 should not be imposed against her for failure to appear. Status on close of estate is also continued to September 9, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Pliego. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate

MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Nicole Kelly appeared by zoom for petitioner.

Mrs. Kelly requested a continuance stating that the estate is essentially insolvent and that she needs time to continue trying to locate her client. Status on close of estate is continued to August 5, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If counsel gets to a point where she has another mechanism in which to close this, the court would be open to it.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.

PETITION TO TERMINATE ESTATE (NO ASSETS)
Off Calendar Nov-09-2022 Continued To Feb-01-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Nicole Kelly, via Zoom, for Poco Young, Personal Representative.

The court acknowledges that counsel had checked-in for the previous calling which is why an Order to Appear was not issued. Counsel reports that she was out of the country when she appeared and was disconnected due to issues with the internet and attempted to reconnect but that the hearings had ended by that time. The court and counsel discuss the delays with this matter. Counsel advises that she has not had contact with her client since approximately April of this year and reports of her client having issues obtaining records. Counsel advises that she has considered filing a motion to be relieved as counsel but would like to try and close this matter instead. The court mentions that she might want to consider petitioning the court for an order for the bank to release records and if she decides to do so, she can file an ex parte application. The court also mentions that she might want to consider filing an amended petition.

The matter is continued to Feb-01-2023 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Rice. Not Reported.

PETITION TO TERMINATE ESTATE (NO ASSETS)
Off Calendar Oct-12-2022 Continued To Nov-09-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person. The court acknowledges that the attorney for the Personal Representative Nicole C. Kelly had checked-in with the clerk via Zoom, prior to the start of the calendar but is no longer present.

Upon consideration, the matter is continued to Nov-09-2022. The court will not issue an Order to Appear.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar Mar-02-2022 Continued To May-11-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Nicole Kelly, via ZOOM, for Poco Young, Administrator.

Counsel apologizes to the court for the delay with this matter and reports that she has been unable to locate her client, that the estate is insolvent and asks for guidance from the court regarding how to proceed. Counsel also advises that she spoke to her clients' son about two weeks ago and he advised her that his mom was in a care home - counsel also advises that she emailed the son last week and he hasn't replied. The court advises counsel to file a report on status of administration and to include the issues she's facing, within the petition.

After additional discussion, the Status on Close of Estate is continued to May-11-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Glisson. Not reported.
